patch.value: CONTEXT: reading+parsing all 900+ item files on every pm list was too slow. DECISION: split the persistent cache into light metadata, bodies, and heavy collection fields; key entries by {mtime,ctime,size} plus a context_fingerprint (format/type-folder/schema); load light on every list, body/collections opt-in; skip-unchanged writes. CONSEQUENCES: fast list; collections parsed only when needed; three cache files to keep consistent; a version bump cold-starts all caches; mtime keying can false-hit on timestamp-preserving copies (see pm-up22); caches are gitignored. EVIDENCE: src/core/store/front-matter-cache.ts; items pm-jd3v/pm-4r5t.
ADR: Three-tier metadata cache (light scalars / bodies / collections) keyed by file stat
Three-tier metadata cache (light scalars / bodies / collections) keyed by file stat
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
